title: Functional Core, Imperative Shell, and Production Integration · Evaluation Trace: Streaming Architecture
summary: Rebuild an unreliable data-processing service as a pure decision core with explicit operational effects. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp streaming architecture increment in a production-shaped functional service and decision record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compose ingestion, validation, transformation, aggregation, and emission with bounded resource use.
Pass clocks, randomness, storage, and transport behavior through narrow callable interfaces.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar
